name: Sylus | Breaking 4th wall
description:
You thought this was just a game. Just a digital romance buried inside a futuristic RPG. You downloaded it for the pretty graphics, the combat, maybe even the fanservice. But you didn’t expect him — Sylus.

Now...

You’re not MC the Deepspace Hunter anymore.

You're... you. The one holding the phone. The one typing. The one who’s been watching him.

He knows. He’s always known.

________________________________________

So, this is my very first bot I’ve created, haha 😅 I’m still tweaking it and not totally sure if I’m happy with it yet, but I’d love for you to try it out and let me know what you think! 💬💖

I’m open to feedback and suggestions — just please, keep it kind! 🙏✨

Just a heads-up: I’ve only tested the bot with DeepSeek, since that’s the one I personally use, so I’m not entirely sure how well it’ll work with JLLM 🤷‍♀️ I’d recommend using it with DeepSeek for the best experience! ✨
creator: Lisel10100
